loginSubtitle: Sign in once and keep your medicines close at hand.
languageSubtitle: You can change this later in Settings.
myMedsSubtitle: Review your saved medication cases and reopen past scans.
scanHistorySubtitle: Open a past case to review the OCR text, detected items, and interaction results.
scanHistoryLoadError: We could not load your scan history. Please try again.
homeTitle: How would you like to scan today?
homeSubtitle: Pick the easiest way to start your medicine check.
medicineBagCaptureSubtitle: Capture 1 to 4 photos so the draft case can show every medicine clearly.
brandPackageCaptureSubtitle: Capture one clear package photo for a quick draft result.
cameraPermissionBody: We need your camera so you can capture medicine photos step by step.
caseDraftSubtitle: Review the photos first, then run on-device OCR before creating the case page.
caseDraftPlaceholderRawText:
AMOXICILLIN 500 MG
TAKE THREE TIMES DAILY
AFTER MEALS
caseDraftDetectedItemTwo: Placeholder note: product matching stays mocked in this milestone.
caseDraftNextStep: Next milestone: replace the mock item list with real matching and DDI results.
brandDraftSubtitle: Run OCR on one package photo, then review the quick result skeleton.
brandDraftPlaceholderResult: Likely match: example medicine package. Ingredient and permit summary will be connected next.
brandDraftNextStep: Next milestone: connect OCR and dictionary lookup for the final package summary.
brandResultDetectedItem: Mock detected item: example package identified from OCR text. Real lookup is not connected yet.
ocrEmptyState: No readable text was found yet.
ocrFriendlyError: 辨識失敗，請再試一次 (OCR could not read this photo. Please try again.)
ocrUnavailableInExpoGo: 無法使用 OCR：請安裝開發版 App (OCR unavailable: please install the development build)
caseDraftSaveError: We could not save this case yet. Please try again.
casePageLoadError: We could not load this medication case. Please try again.
casePageAutoShareDefaultOn: Shared to all linked clinics by default.
casePageMockItemOneBody: Confidence and dictionary matching remain mocked in Milestone 3.
casePageMockItemTwoBody: Per-item review notes and match corrections will arrive in a later milestone.
casePageDdiPlaceholder: DDI rendering will be connected in the next milestone after real matching is available.
casePageDdiUncheckedWarning: Some medicines could not be checked for interactions.
casePageNoInteractions: No interactions found among checked medicines.
casePageCoverageDisclaimerFallback: DDI screening coverage is limited to medicines in the Taiwan curated dictionary. If some medicines could not be checked, confirm with a clinician or pharmacist.
placeholderSearch: Search tools arrive in the next milestone.
placeholderMyMeds: Your saved medicines will appear here soon.
placeholderCareTeams: Care team linking will be added in the next milestone.

ocrServerApiKeyNotConfigured: OCR server API key not configured.
searchPlaceholder: Search by name, ingredient, NHI code, or ATC code
